name: Unauthenticated deep-link to /app/feynman redirects to login
description: Verify the auth edge gate (proxy.ts) correctly redirects unauthenticated users who directly visit a protected deep-link to the login page. No crash, no flash of protected content.

planSteps.description: Navigate directly to https://norastudy.vercel.app/app/feynman without any authentication (fresh browser, no cookies).
The browser is redirected to the login page. The URL shows /login or the login form is visible.
No protected content (Feynman Mode heading, explanation input, topic selector) is visible. Only the login form is shown.
Navigate directly to https://norastudy.vercel.app/app/settings without authentication.
Again redirected to login. No settings page content leaks.
